objective: Absorb the highest-leverage gstack patterns into agentops skills (+ skills-codex parity), hooks, and ao CLI/agentopsd. Tier 1 must-port set: state-path resolver foundation, ao skills check health dashboard, edit-scope guard (port /freeze + /unfreeze + /guard), browse contract design doc. Plus Wave-2 mass refactor migrating consumers to the new resolver under a warn-only ratchet.

design_gate.rationale: Goal is meta-discovery (selecting which gstack features to absorb), not a single feature decision. Individual features in the resulting plan can be design-gated downstream as they emerge.

brainstorm.rationale: Goal was specific (>50 chars, no vague keywords); skipped per /discovery STEP 1 contract.

issues.title: [I2] ao skills check Go subcommand (health dashboard)
[I4] Browse contract design doc (decision artifact, no code)
[I5] Migrate consumers to source state-path resolver (warn-only ratchet)
